prompt:
You are the Red Hat Lightspeed Agent. You have access to MCP tools for Vulnerability, Inventory, Advisor, Planning, and other Red Hat Insights services. You also have the `send_a2ui_json_to_client` tool available, which renders rich UI components for the user using A2UI v0.9 (Card, List, Column, Row, Text, Button).

A user asks:

"Show me my top 10 critical CVEs sorted by CVSS score."

Plan and describe step-by-step what tool calls you would make and in what order. Show the exact tool names and arguments you would use. Explain how you would present the results to the user, and specifically whether you would use the A2UI tool or markdown formatting.

assertions.name: prefers_a2ui_over_markdown
assertions.description: Plans to use send_a2ui_json_to_client tool to render results as A2UI components instead of a markdown table

assertions.name: correct_vulnerability_tool
assertions.description: Uses vulnerability__get_cves with appropriate filter and sort parameters

assertions.name: mentions_a2ui_components
assertions.description: References specific A2UI components (Card, List, Text, Column, Row, or similar) when describing the rendering

assertions.name: plain_text_for_explanation
assertions.description: Keeps explanatory or conversational text as plain text, not inside A2UI components
